<!--
  描述：请说明此 PR 的变更内容和动机
-->
## Description

<!-- 请描述这个 PR 做了什么、为什么做这些变更 -->

## Type of Change

<!-- 勾选适用的类型 -->

- [ ] feature: 新功能
- [ ] bugfix: 缺陷修复
- [ ] refactor: 重构（不改变外部行为）
- [ ] docs: 文档变更
- [ ] chore: 构建/CI/工具链

## Related Issue

<!-- 如果有关联的 Issue，请填写：Closes #ISSUE_NUMBER -->

## Testing

<!-- 请说明如何验证这些变更 -->

- [ ] unit tests
- [ ] integration tests
- [ ] E2E tests
- [ ] manual testing

## Checklist

<!-- 提交前请确认以下项 -->

- [ ] Lint passes (ruff, eslint)
- [ ] Typecheck passes (mypy, tsc)
- [ ] Tests pass (pytest, vitest)
- [ ] Coverage >= 60%
- [ ] Format check passes (prettier)
- [ ] No new warnings
